content.en:
Time passes slowly.

After a while, Ye Tian's spiritual power completed the second transformation.

"I have broken through, the realm of the second spiritual transformation, and with my tricky killing moves, my strength has far surpassed the trick powerhouse in this small city. "

But Ye Tian knew that this strength was still not enough, and he had to continue to improve.

So, he continued to practice penance and even stole some resources to improve his spiritual strength.

Many items contain the power of trickery, and absorbing the power of trickery in them helps to temper spiritual power.

It was impossible for Ye Tian to quickly improve his cultivation in a short period of time, so he could only choose to snatch these resources.

Many forces were encountered, and they were all targeted by Ye Tian.

Soon after, Ye Tian collected a bunch of these resources, which were then used to improve his spiritual strength.

Another month passed.

Ye Tian's spiritual power ushered in the third transformation, and his strength skyrocketed again.

After the three transformations of spiritual power, it is very difficult to continue the transformation.

However, there was at least hope that he would escape.

Then, he waited quietly for the strange thing to attack the small city.

After another period of time, Ye Tian's spiritual power had skyrocketed, and he was not far from breaking through the fourth transformation.

this day.

A monster with an incomparably large body enveloped the entire town, and its terrifying aura made many powerful people show despair.

"It's a membranous clam weird, at least comparable to a strong person with seven spiritual transformations, we can't escape!"

A treacherous powerhouse said in despair.

However, they were still unwilling to give up and fled one after another.

Abrupt.

The body of a treacherous powerhouse with a second spiritual transformation suddenly shattered, and then it was swallowed by the membranous clam.

The same is true of the other treacherous powerhouses, who fled one by one, and before they could escape far, they were killed.

Countless invisible hands seemed to appear in the sky, grabbing and swallowing the creatures of the Mysterious Heaven and Earth.

"It's now!"

Ye Tian blessed himself with a dark force field, and then fled with all his might.

Suddenly.

A strange force came, it was the membranous clam who made a strange move, but Ye Tian forcibly resisted this blow by virtue of his dark position.

Rumble!

Ye Tian's body flew out, but he survived.

"Blocked!"

He continued to escape, out of the range of the membranous clam's strange attack.

This membranous clam weirdly didn't take Ye Tian in its eyes, and it didn't react until Ye Tian fled, but it didn't chase Ye Tian.

For the sake of a Ye Tian, giving up the food in this city is undoubtedly a bit more than worth the loss.

......

"Finally escaped!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

That membranous clam is indeed very weird, if his real body copies the body, it can be killed hundreds of millions of times in a breath.

But now this body is too weak, so naturally it is not an opponent.

"Let's go to Heavenly Snake City!"

Heavenly Snake City is a large city nearby, and this will definitely not happen.

Immediately, he hurried silently, and encountered some strange things on the way, but he was not so powerful, and he still arrived at Heavenly Snake City safely.

......

Heavenly Snake City is huge, and there are many strong people here, but it is still chaos.

The chaos is a true portrayal of this treacherous world.

After entering Heavenly Snake City, with his eight-year-old body, he naturally encountered a lot of trouble, but when he showed the strength of three spiritual transformations, no one dared to provoke him, and he thought that he was the son of a powerful force!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian rented a house, and then cultivated with peace of mind.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

After a while.

Ye Tian has completed four spiritual transformations, and his combat power is at least comparable to that of a treacherous powerhouse with six spiritual transformations, and with his current strength, it is at least a mid-grade in Heavenly Snake City.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian began to look for a higher talent of trickery.

Heavenly Snake City is even more powerful, and there must be more strong people with higher tricky talents here, and there are definitely talents above the five-star tricky talents.

So, he often touched others, and finally copied an eight-star trick talent one day, and after the fusion, his own talent skyrocketed, and he absorbed more tricky power, and his strength improved faster.

Meantime.

He also often exchanges some trick cheats, and even exchanges his own trick cheats for more trick cheats.

Of course, he was also targeted by some people, but when he secretly attacked and killed those people, he also solved a lot of trouble.

Gradually, a relatively long time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's spiritual power has completed seven transformations, and his strength has far surpassed that membranous clam, and he has also grown into a handsome young man.

"I'm already very strong now, and I can rank among the top in Heavenly Snake City, it's time to go out and look for higher trick talents, as well as collect more trick cheats!"

Subsequently.

He walked through the big cities, constantly looking for higher trick talents, resources, and more trick cheats.

He is constantly improving his Dark Star Secret Method, creating more tricky killing moves, his strength is also steadily improving, and his tricky talent is also improving again and again.

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's tricky talent has been improved to a twelve-star talent, and his cultivation has reached the level of ten spiritual transformations, and he has created more and more tricky killing moves.

In this area, his strength is already extremely strong.

At this point, as long as he is not too unlucky, he will hardly fall.

However, he didn't go to those territories that were too powerful, otherwise he would encounter some invincible enemies, and no matter how talented he was, it would be useless.

this day.

Ye Tian heard that an incomparably terrifying strange thing had fallen somewhere, and many strong people did not dare to approach, otherwise they would be wiped out by the power of treachery.

But there are still many strong people approaching, and Ye Tian has also passed.

In the middle of a mountain range, the corpse of a strange thing resembling a giant snake lay horizontally, although it had been dead for a long time, the aura on its body was extremely terrifying.

"'. It's definitely a tricky powerhouse comparable to seventeen spiritual transformations!" Ye Tian said with a sigh of relief.

He didn't leave, but approached silently, and then sensed the power of this strange thing, so as to gain some insights from it, create some powerful tricks, and perfect the secret method of the dark star.

He stayed here all this time to meditate, and before he knew it, a long time had passed.

this day.

Ye Tian successfully perfected the Dark Star Secret Method to an extremely advanced level, and also created an extremely terrifying killing move - Eternal Night!

This killing move is once it is cast.,Extreme darkness appears around.,And then the power of darkness directly obliterates the enemy's existence.。。
